tags.value:
SELECT workflow_schedule_plans.id, workflow_schedule_plans.app_id, workflow_schedule_plans.node_id, workflow_schedule_plans.tenant_id, workflow_schedule_plans.cron_expression, workflow_schedule_plans.timezone, workflow_schedule_plans.next_run_at, workflow_schedule_plans.created_at, workflow_schedule_plans.updated_at 
FROM workflow_schedule_plans JOIN app_triggers ON app_triggers.app_id = workflow_schedule_plans.app_id AND app_triggers.node_id = workflow_schedule_plans.node_id AND app_triggers.trigger_type = %(trigger_type_1)s 
WHERE workflow_schedule_plans.next_run_at <= %(next_run_at_1)s AND workflow_schedule_plans.next_run_at IS NOT NULL AND app_triggers.status = %(status_1)s ORDER BY workflow_schedule_plans.next_run_at ASC 
 LIMIT %(param_1)s FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED

SELECT human_input_forms.tenant_id, human_input_forms.app_id, human_input_forms.workflow_run_id, human_input_forms.conversation_id, human_input_forms.form_kind, human_input_forms.node_id, human_input_forms.form_definition, human_input_forms.rendered_content, human_input_forms.status, human_input_forms.expiration_time, human_input_forms.selected_action_id, human_input_forms.submitted_data, human_input_forms.submitted_at, human_input_forms.submission_user_id, human_input_forms.submission_end_user_id, human_input_forms.completed_by_recipient_id, human_input_forms.id, human_input_forms.created_at, human_input_forms.updated_at 
FROM human_input_forms 
WHERE human_input_forms.status = %(status_1)s AND (human_input_forms.expiration_time <= %(expiration_time_1)s OR human_input_forms.created_at <= %(created_at_1)s) ORDER BY human_input_forms.id ASC 
 LIMIT %(param_1)s

SELECT count(*) AS count_1 
FROM trigger_subscriptions 
WHERE trigger_subscriptions.credential_expires_at != %(credential_expires_at_1)s AND trigger_subscriptions.credential_expires_at <= %(credential_expires_at_2)s OR trigger_subscriptions.expires_at != %(expires_at_1)s AND trigger_subscriptions.expires_at <= %(expires_at_2)s

SELECT count(*) AS count_1 
FROM trigger_subscriptions 
WHERE trigger_subscriptions.credential_expires_at != %(credential_expires_at_1)s AND trigger_subscriptions.credential_expires_at <= %(credential_expires_at_2)s OR trigger_subscriptions.expires_at != %(expires_at_1)s AND trigger_subscriptions.expires_at <= %(expires_at_2)s

SELECT tenant_plugin_auto_upgrade_strategies.id, tenant_plugin_auto_upgrade_strategies.tenant_id, tenant_plugin_auto_upgrade_strategies.category, tenant_plugin_auto_upgrade_strategies.strategy_setting, tenant_plugin_auto_upgrade_strategies.upgrade_mode, tenant_plugin_auto_upgrade_strategies.exclude_plugins, tenant_plugin_auto_upgrade_strategies.include_plugins, tenant_plugin_auto_upgrade_strategies.upgrade_time_of_day, tenant_plugin_auto_upgrade_strategies.created_at, tenant_plugin_auto_upgrade_strategies.updated_at 
FROM tenant_plugin_auto_upgrade_strategies 
WHERE tenant_plugin_auto_upgrade_strategies.upgrade_time_of_day >= %(upgrade_time_of_day_1)s AND tenant_plugin_auto_upgrade_strategies.upgrade_time_of_day < %(upgrade_time_of_day_2)s AND tenant_plugin_auto_upgrade_strategies.strategy_setting != %(strategy_setting_1)s
